_comment: 25 hand-labeled WitUS Inbox submissions. `expectedCategory` is the ground-truth label used by the classify test (first 5) and the Day-7 accuracy eval (all 25, npm run eval). PRD acceptance #5: classification accuracy >= 80%. Each row mirrors the witus-inbox `submission` shape.

payload.subject: How do I reset my review streak?
payload.message: Hi! I missed a few days of study and my streak reset to zero. Is there a way to set the streak back, or a grace period setting I can turn on? I'm not upset, just want to know how it works.

payload.subject: Preflight checklist won't save
payload.message: Every time I complete the preflight checklist and hit Save, the page spins for about 20 seconds and then shows 'Something went wrong'. The flight record is never created. I've tried Chrome and Safari on two devices. This started this morning.

payload.subject: Idea: shared goals with a partner
payload.message: Love the goals module. It would be amazing if my spouse and I could share a household goal and both check it off. Any chance that's on the roadmap?

payload.subject: Charged twice for the annual plan
payload.message: I was billed $103.29 on the 3rd and again on the 11th for the same annual subscription. My bank shows both as posted, not pending. Please refund the duplicate and let me know it's sorted.
CONGRATULATIONS!!! Your email was selected to receive $5,000,000 USD. Click http://claim-prize-now.example to verify your bank details and claim before 24 hours. Act fast!!!
Your support team is a bunch of useless idiots and I hope your whole company burns down. I'm going to make your life hell until you reply.

payload.subject: Audio not playing on vocab cards
payload.message: On the Spanish deck the pronunciation audio button is greyed out for about half the cards. The other half work fine. Is this a known issue or something on my end?
Just wanted to say the Academy longevity course was excellent. No question — keep up the great work.

payload.subject: Can't find where to add a new venue
payload.message: I've been clicking around the dashboard for ten minutes. Where exactly do I add a new venue to a job? A pointer would be great, thanks.

payload.subject: Export flight logs to CSV
payload.message: Would you consider adding a CSV export for flight records? I need to hand my logbook to an insurer once a quarter and copy-paste is painful.

payload.subject: Promo code rejected at checkout
payload.message: I have an educator promo code from the BVC pilot packet but checkout says 'code not valid'. I've copied it exactly. Can you check whether my code is active? I'd like to start the annual plan today.

payload.subject: 360 tour stuck on loading
payload.message: The Kyoto 360 lesson never finishes loading — just a spinner. Other lessons open fine. Tried reloading and a different browser. Could be a broken asset on that specific tour.

payload.subject: How does the spaced repetition interval work?
payload.message: I'm curious how the app decides when to show a card again. Is it a fixed schedule or does it adapt to how well I answered? Just want to understand it better.

payload.subject: Where do I change my timezone?
payload.message: My daily check-in reminders arrive three hours early. I think my timezone is wrong but I can't find the setting. Which menu is it under?
Quick question — can two contractors share one job, or is each job tied to a single account? Trying to figure out if WitUS fits how my crew works before I commit.

payload.subject: Is the offline mode documented anywhere?
payload.message: I fly in areas with no signal. Does the app keep working offline, and is there a guide on what syncs when I reconnect? Couldn't find docs on it.

payload.subject: Progress lost after today's update
payload.message: I opened the app this morning and all 14 of my decks show 0% progress. The cards are still there but every review I've done for months is gone. This has to be a data bug — please tell me it's recoverable.

payload.subject: Show dates display in the wrong order
payload.message: On the tour calendar, shows sort newest-first even though the sort control says oldest-first. Toggling it does nothing. Minor but confusing when I'm advancing the run of show.
The finance dashboard total doesn't match the sum of my accounts. It's off by exactly one account's balance — looks like a hidden account is being excluded from the total. Can someone look?

payload.subject: Captions for the 360 lessons
payload.message: I'd love to use Wanderlearn with my deaf students. Any plans to add captions or transcripts to the narrated 360 tours? That would make it usable for my whole class.

payload.subject: Recurring invoices
payload.message: Most of my clients are on monthly retainers. Right now I recreate the invoice by hand each month. A recurring-invoice option would save me an hour a week — is that something you'd build?

payload.subject: Cancelled but still being charged
payload.message: I cancelled my subscription six weeks ago and have a confirmation email. My card was charged again yesterday for the monthly plan. Please stop the charges and refund the one from yesterday.
I paid for the lifetime tier via CashApp three days ago but my account still shows the free plan. The page said CashApp activation can take 24 hours — it's been longer. Can you activate it?

payload.subject: Boost your Google ranking — guaranteed page 1
payload.message: Hello, we are an SEO agency. We can get witus.online to page 1 of Google with 5,000 high-quality backlinks for only $99/month. Reply 'YES' to start. Limited slots this week!
Whoever coded this garbage should be fired and never work again. You people are scammers and morons. I will be posting your home address online so everyone knows what kind of trash you are.
